parityMeta.describes: CC-2 coachActionEngine — FUNCTION-LEVEL parity for buildCoachActions (src/engines/coachActionEngine.ts:624). Each case echoes the BuildCoachActionsInput (appData + the already-native type-only result inputs: dailyAdjustment / nextWorkout / dataHealthReport / sessionQuality / plateauResults / volumeAdaptation / recommendationConfidence / setAnomalies / recoveryRecommendation + an explicit `now`) and the REAL engine output (the ordered CoachAction[]). Cases pin: every source builder (dataHealthActions ts:306 + severity sort + slice(0,3); setAnomalyActions ts:577 critical/warning slice(0,2); dailyAdjustmentAction ts:366 + normal-skip; nextWorkoutAction ts:392 + warnings priority; recoveryAction ts:412 via recoveryRecommendation AND the nextWorkout.recovery fallback + modified branch; sessionQualityAction ts:434; plateauActions ts:460 create_preview vs review_exercise + the actionSeed fingerprint with sourceTemplate; volumeActions ts:502 preview+review + the suggestedChange fingerprint; recommendationConfidenceActions ts:556 single AND array forms); dedupeActions priority-keep (ts:599); sortActions priority DESC + dataHealth-first + id tie-break (ts:608); lowNoiseDuringActiveSession gate (ts:617); tomorrowIso expiresAt (ts:113). The Swift CoachActionEngine.buildCoachActions re-runs the SAME builder over each echoed input and COMPUTE-ASSERTs the ordered CoachAction list (canonical-JSON) == golden `result`, case-by-case.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: No wall clock — `now` is an EXPLICIT input on every case (the `new Date()` fallback at ts:637 is never hit). `now` is 2026-06-04T08:00:00.000Z (June, DST-invariant under TZ=America/New_York) so tomorrowIso's NY-local setDate(+1) equals +86_400_000 ms UTC = 2026-06-05T08:00:00.000Z. Synthetic exercise ids use a `cc2-` prefix NOT present in EXERCISE_KNOWLEDGE_OVERRIDES so enrichExercise lands on its default branch (primaryMuscles=[muscle], secondaryMuscles=[]) — bit-identical to the empty-seam Swift EngineUtils.enrichExercise. Within each priority tier the competing action ids differ at an ASCII letter/digit (never a hyphen) so id.localeCompare reproduces with a code-point comparison. No email/token/userId/deviceLabel. Chinese muscle/exercise names only.
